name: Dimension
summary: The Dimension class provides base functionality for classes DimensionLinear and DimensionRadial. It's not instantiable.

methods.name: add_observer
methods.summary: Note: If the given observer responds to onTextChanged, it will be added as a Sketchup::DimensionObserver.
methods.remarks: Note: If the given observer responds to onTextChanged, it will be added as a Sketchup::DimensionObserver. If not, the base Entity#add_observer will be called. The add_observer method is used to add a DimensionObserver to the dimension.

returns.doc: true if successful, false if unsuccessful.

methods.name: has_aligned_text?
methods.summary: The has_aligned_text method is used to determine whether the dimension's text is aligned to the dimension or to the screen.
methods.remarks: The has_aligned_text method is used to determine whether the dimension's text is aligned to the dimension or to the screen.

returns.doc: status - true if text is aligned to the dimension. False if dimension text is aligned to the screen.

methods.name: plane
methods.summary: The plane method is used to retrieve the plane of the dimension.
methods.remarks: The plane method is used to retrieve the plane of the dimension. Refer to the Geom module for information on how planes are represented.

methods.name: remove_observer
methods.summary: The remove_observer method is used to remove a DimensionObserver from the dimension.
methods.remarks: The remove_observer method is used to remove a DimensionObserver from the dimension. Note that, if the given observer responds to 'onTextChanged', it will be removed as a DimensionObserver. If not, the base Entity.remove_observer will be called.

returns.doc: true if successful, false if unsuccessful.

properties.name: arrow_type
properties.summary: The #arrow_type method retrieves the current arrow type of the dimension.
properties.remarks: The #arrow_type method retrieves the current arrow type of the dimension. Valid arrow types are: ARROW_NONE ARROW_SLASH ARROW_DOT ARROW_CLOSED ARROW_OPEN

properties.name: had_aligned_text
properties.summary: The has_aligned_text= method accepts true or false indicating whether the dimension's text is aligned to the dimension or to the screen.
properties.remarks: The has_aligned_text= method accepts true or false indicating whether the dimension's text is aligned to the dimension or to the screen.

properties.name: text
properties.summary: The text method is used to retrieve the dimension text.
properties.remarks: The text method is used to retrieve the dimension text.
